subject: grammar
title: Mixed Conditionals: Mistake correction
instruction: Find and correct the one mistake in each sentence below.

questions.text: If I hadn't ate so much I wouldn't have a stomach ache now.
What would you done if you'd failed the exam?
I am starting university next autumn if I hadn't had such bad exam results.
If the government would have kept their promise, taxes wouldn't have gone up last year.
I would have finished my essay on time if I didn't have the accident.
If I was getting married next weekend, I was very excited by now.
questions.answer: 'd be very excited|||would be very excited

questions.text: If the economic conditions had been better when I bought this house, I might make a fortune by now.
Life today will be very different if Thomas Edison hadn't invented the electric light.
If you were more considerate, you didn't make so much noise last night.
If I didn't go to university, I wouldn't be doing this job now.
